Upload → Probe → Transcode → Subtitle / Audio → Package → DRM → QC → Origin / CDN 预热
Client → WAF/Gateway → Auth/BFF → Play Auth → Playback Token → CDN/Origin + DRM License
埋点 → Kafka → Flink 实时特征 → 召回 → 粗排 → 精排 → 重排
ADS 决策 → VAST → Playback SSAI / Manifest Manipulator → beacon 上报
